items.name: y2k gold butterfly chain initial necklace C
items.description:
OTHER COLORS/LETTERS: 
https://www.roblox.com/catalog?Keyword=INITIAL&Category=1&CreatorName=QTPIE&CreatorType=Group&salesTypeFilter=1

Elevate your Roblox avatar's style with the Gold Y2K Butterfly Initial Necklace C. This stunning virtual accessory features a delicate butterfly pendant paired with an elegant initial "C" charm, both in a chic gold finish. Perfectly capturing the nostalgic and stylish Y2K aesthetic.

Ideal for fans of early 2000s fashion and those who love to accessorize, the Gold Y2K Butterfly Initial Necklace C is a must-have item in your virtual collection. The butterfly symbolizes transformation and beauty, while the initial charm adds a personal touch, making it a unique and meaningful accessory. This necklace enhances your avatar's appearance with its trendy and elegant design. Showcase your individuality and embrace the Y2K vibe with the Gold Y2K Butterfly Initial Necklace C. Get yours today and let your avatar shine with this beautiful and stylish piece!

items.name: chain 💎
items.description:
This awesome and classic iced out diamond chain necklace has a subtle glowing effect in bright light environments . It's great for the coolest outfits that want awesome luxury sparkly diamonds look along with a magic glow crystal . Whether you're dressing emo / scene / goth / punk / Y2K / retro or any style -- wear this epic necklace . The amulet / gem part of this necklace has a summer ombre effect .
